title: Decision 1/2025 of the UK-Colombia-Peru-Ecuador Trade Committee [TS No.40/2025]
body: "Published title: Decision 1/2025 of the UK-Colombia-Peru-Ecuador Trade Committee of 28 May 2025 Modifying the Tariff Elimination Schedule of the United Kingdom for Goods Originating in Colombia Annex I to the Trade Agreement between the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland of the one part, and Colombia, Ecuador and Peru, of the other part. "
